playerConfig.title: Player Configuration
playerConfig.description: Configuration for the player's profile, including image and scale.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the player's vertical image.

imageScale.description: The scale of the player's image (e.g., 1.0 for 100%).

textOffset.description: The vertical offset of the text relative to the image (negative for overlap).

leftLogoUrl.description: URL for the logo on the top left.

rightLogoUrl.description: URL for the logo on the top right.

updatedAt.description: The last time the configuration was updated.

/config/player.description: The single document containing player profile configuration.
